stemHtml: An aircraft experiences radio communication failure over the ocean but still within US territory. The aircraft is registered in Italy and the operator is in France. Which procedures do you follow?

options.a: The pilot must follow the lost comm procedure of the US, since he/she is over the US.
options.b: The pilot must follow the lost comm procedure of Italy, since the aircraft is registered in Italy.
options.c: The pilot must follow the lost comm procedure of France, since the operator is in France.
options.d: Italy and USA rules apply, however Italy has priority because the aircraft is registered in Italy.
